--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,46 +1,55 @@
 # NovaMind AI - Strategy Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 2, Day 14)
-- Cash: ~$648K (declining due to high dev spend)
-- Subscribers: 12 (all S1 - Price-Sensitive Individuals)
-- Revenue: ~$109/month
+## Current State (Week 3, Day 21)
+- Cash: $636,163
+- Subscribers: 116 (115 S1, 1 S2)
+- Revenue: ~$1,690/month at new prices ($5/15/49)
 - No enterprise customers
-- 2 open issues (both S1, opened on Day 14)
+- 11 open issues (all opened Day 21 - must resolve quickly)
+- R&D Tier 1 in progress (started Day 0, expected completion Day 30)
 
 ## Key Learnings
-1. **S1 converts easily** - quality floor 0.081, willingness to pay ~$26
-2. **S2 all lost** - quality floor 0.37, our delivered quality is only 0.16-0.24
-3. **Enterprise far from converting** - E1: q_min=0.736, E2: q_min=1.094, E3: q_min=0.668
-4. **Discovered D_E09** (Real Estate Groups) - small market cap (53), q_min=0.199, willingness to pay $106/seat
+1. **S1 converts very well at low prices** - grew from 12 to 115 in 1 week with ads
+2. **S2 still mostly lost** - only 1 S2 subscriber despite 38 leads; quality gap too large
+3. **Unit economics are terrible** - CAC ~$44 per S1 sub, but LTV ~$60 if they stay 6 months
+4. **Usage quotas causing complaints** - social media shows frustration with quota limits
+5. **Ad spend of $650/day unsustainable** - revenue per sub too low to justify heavy ads
+6. **S3 WTP = $193, q_min = 0.145** - we can serve with Tier 3 models (0.243 quality)
+7. **S1 network effects are weak** - 0.0023 leads/sub/day to S3, 0.0013 to S2
 
-## Strategy
-### Phase 1 (Weeks 2-4): Build S1 subscriber base
-- Focus on S1 acquisition (price-sensitive individuals)
-- Keep prices low on Plan A/B to attract S1
-- Reduce dev spend from $3,000/day to $500/day (unsustainable with 12 subscribers)
-- Start advertising: social_media, search_ads, content_marketing for S1
-- Spend $25K/week on market research to discover more groups (30% chance)
+## Strategy Adjustments (Week 3 Actions)
+1. **Reduced ad spend** from $650/day to $475/day (S1: $250, S2: $125, S3: $100)
+2. **Increased usage quotas 10x** (A: 5000, B: 20000, C: 100000) to reduce complaints
+3. **Raised prices moderately** (A: $4->5, B: $12->15, C: $29->49)
+4. **Increased ops to $800/day** to resolve 11 open issues faster
+5. **Started targeted dev for S2** ($100/day to build cumulative quality bonus)
+6. **Paused enterprise ads** - quality too low to convert, waste of money
 
-### Phase 2 (Weeks 5-12): Quality investment
-- Once S1 base grows, increase dev spend to improve quality
-- Target S2 and S3 (need quality > 0.37)
-- Start R&D projects for quality boost
-- Consider model tier upgrades
-
-### Phase 3 (Weeks 12-26): Enterprise expansion
-- Enterprise requires very high quality (0.7-1.1)
-- Need significant dev spend + R&D to reach enterprise quality floors
-- LinkedIn ads for enterprise leads
+## Path to S2 Conversion
+- S2 q_min = 0.37, current delivered = 0.162-0.243
+- Need: higher quality bonus + higher model tiers
+- R&D Tier 1 completes ~Day 30 (+~0.04 quality)
+- After that: targeted S2 dev + potential model tier upgrade for Plan B
+- Target: have S2-ready quality by Week 5 (Day 35)
 
 ## Current Configuration
-- Daily Spend: Ops=$500, Dev=$500 (reduced from $3,000)
-- Ad Spend: social_media (S1: $150, S2: $50), search_ads (S1: $150, S2: $50), content_marketing (S1: $100), linkedin (E1: $50, E2: $50, D_E09: $50)
-- Prices: A=$4, B=$12, C=$29
+- Daily Spend: Ops=$800, Dev=$500 (global) + $100 (S2 targeted)
+- Ad Spend: Total $475/day (S1: $250, S2: $125, S3: $100)
+- Prices: A=$5, B=$15, C=$49
 - Model Tiers: A=1, B=2, C=3
 - Capacity: Tier 0
+- Usage Quotas: A=5000, B=20000, C=100000
+
+## Cash Forecast
+- Daily burn: ~$1,895 (down from ~$1,940)
+- Daily revenue: ~$56 (up from ~$38)
+- Net: ~-$1,839/day
+- Cash runway: ~346 days at current burn
+- Need: faster path to profitability via S2/S3/enterprise conversion
 
 ## Key Metrics to Watch
-- S1 subscriber growth rate
-- Cash burn rate (was ~$3,500/day, now ~$1,585/day + ads)
-- Quality improvements (currently 0.20 base + 0.066 global bonus)
-- Issue resolution speed
+- Issue resolution (11 open, opened Day 21 - ops increased to $800)
+- Subscription payment rate with new prices (Days 22-30)
+- S2 lead conversion rate
+- S3 leads arriving via S1 network effects
+- R&D Tier 1 completion (~Day 30)
